Uruguay Round Agreements: Entry Into ForceThe Uruguay Round Agreements, including the World Trade Organization Agreement and agreements annexed to that Agreement, as referred to in , entered into force with respect to the United States on . children.heading: GATT 1947
children.label: A GATT 1947
children.text: The term “GATT 1947” means the General Agreement on Tariffs and Trade, dated , annexed to the Final Act Adopted at the Conclusion of the Second Session of the Preparatory Committee of the United Nations Conference on Trade and Employment, as subsequently rectified, amended, or modified by the terms of legal instruments which have entered into force before the date of entry into force of the WTO Agreement.October 30, 1947

children.heading: GATT 1994
children.label: B GATT 1994
children.text: The term “GATT 1994” means the General Agreement on Tariffs and Trade annexed to the WTO Agreement.

children.heading: HTS
children.label: 2 HTS
children.text: The term “HTS” means the Harmonized Tariff Schedule of the United States.

children.heading: International Trade Commission
children.label: 3 International Trade Commission
children.text: The term “International Trade Commission” means the United States International Trade Commission.

children.heading: Multilateral trade agreement
children.label: 4 Multilateral trade agreement
children.text: The term “multilateral trade agreement” means an agreement described in (other than an agreement described in paragraph (17) or (18) of such section).section 3511(d) of this title

children.heading: Schedule XX
children.label: 5 Schedule XX
children.text: The term “Schedule XX” means Schedule XX—United States of America annexed to the Marrakesh Protocol to the GATT 1994.

children.heading: Trade Representative
children.label: 6 Trade Representative
children.text: The term “Trade Representative” means the United States Trade Representative.

children.heading: Uruguay Round Agreements
children.label: 7 Uruguay Round Agreements
children.text: The term “Uruguay Round Agreements” means the agreements approved by the Congress under .section 3511(a)(1) of this title

children.heading: World Trade Organization and WTO
children.label: 8 World Trade Organization and WTO
children.text: The terms “World Trade Organization” and “WTO” mean the organization established pursuant to the WTO Agreement.

children.heading: WTO Agreement
children.label: 9 WTO Agreement
children.text: The term “WTO Agreement” means the Agreement Establishing the World Trade Organization entered into on .April 15, 1994

children.heading: WTO member and WTO member country
children.label: 10 WTO member and WTO member country
children.text: The terms “WTO member” and “WTO member country” mean a state, or separate customs territory (within the meaning of Article XII of the WTO Agreement), with respect to which the United States applies the WTO Agreement.
